nasb.text: He shall make restitution for that which he has sinned against the holy thing, and shall add to it a fifth part of it and give it to the priest. The priest shall then make atonement for him with the ram of the guilt offering, and it will be forgiven him.

esv.text: He shall also make restitution for what he has done amiss in the holy thing and shall add a fifth to it and give it to the priest. And the priest shall make atonement for him with the ram of the guilt offering, and he shall be forgiven.

cnv.text: 他要補償他在聖物上所虧欠的，另加五分之一，交給祭司；祭司要用贖愆祭的公綿羊為他贖罪，他就蒙赦免。

ccb.text: 他要赔偿所造成的损失，并加赔五分之一，要把这些都交给祭司。祭司要为他献上公绵羊作赎过祭，为他赎罪，他就会得到赦免。
